description_long: This object depicts a police officer figure with highly distorted and elongated limbs and body parts, resulting in an abstract, fragmented appearance. The figure appears to be wearing a dark blue or black uniform with a matching cap or helmet, and the face is partially visible beneath the headgear. The uniform includes a long-sleeved shirt and pants, but the proportions are exaggerated and stretched, with sharp, angular extensions radiating from the body. The surface of the object is smooth and glossy, with a metallic or synthetic sheen. There are no clearly visible police insignia, badges, or utility belt equipment due to the severe distortion of the form. The overall structure is chaotic, with intersecting planes and spikes that obscure typical human features.
description: A highly distorted police officer figure in a dark blue uniform with a matching helmet, featuring elongated, angular limbs and a glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the police officer's face, helmet, and upper torso, with limbs and uniform stretched into sharp, angular forms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the arms and legs, with the head partially visible and body fragmented.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the chaotic, intersecting extensions and the back of the helmet, with the body almost unrecognizable.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the helmet and upper body, with limbs splayed out in jagged, abstract shapes.
attribute_uniform_type: Dark blue long-sleeved shirt and pants, matching helmet, no visible tactical vest or utility gear, highly abstracted and fragmented.
attribute_headgear_style: Rounded helmet in matching blue, smooth surface, no visible insignia or attachments.
